description_short: Helps start-up or established clients develop innovative embedded systems for medtech, biotechnology, and industrial fields.
description_long: Transforming ideas into proof of concept prototypes with expertise in electronics hardware and software. Technologies include analog and digital hardware design, microfluidics control, mechatronics, video capture and transmission, and more.
company_registration: ISO 9001, QMS ISO 13485, Medical Devices IEC 62304
